item.title: Add manifest version checking on all JSON manifest reads across evolve/cloud
item.intent: Prevent silent data corruption when manifest formats change. Every manifest read must validate the version field and fail clearly on unsupported versions.
item.description: Code review found that multiple modules write manifest files with version: 1 but never validate version on read. If the manifest format changes in a future version, old code will parse new manifests incorrectly — either silently producing wrong data or crashing with confusing errors. Affects skill manifests, export manifests, destruction proofs, and cloud state files.
steps: Identify all manifest read locations across evolve/ and cloud/ modules
Add version validation to each manifest reader (reject if version !== expected)
Add descriptive error messages mentioning the expected vs actual version
Add tests for version mismatch on skill, export, destruction, and cloud manifests
acceptanceCriteria: All manifest read functions validate the version field before parsing
Unsupported manifest versions produce a clear error message
Tests cover version mismatch scenarios for each manifest type
